description_long: This is a sporty coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in a light silver color, accented by a black hood and a prominent rear spoiler. The car features large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with red brake calipers, and its side panels are decorated with a striking snake-themed graphic in shades of orange and black. The front end displays a bold grille and aggressive headlights, while the rear is equipped with a wide bumper and dual exhausts. The windows are tinted, and the car has two doors, typical of high-performance coupes. The overall design suggests a vehicle built for speed and style, likely inspired by racing or tuner culture. The materials and build quality indicate a modern, high-end private vehicle suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A silver coupe car with a black hood, large rear spoiler, and snake-themed side graphics, featuring sporty wheels and tinted windows. Its aggressive styling and two-door layout highlight its performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black hood, aggressive grille, and headlights, with the car's wide stance and sporty front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the snake-themed graphic, large alloy wheels, tinted windows, and the prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide bumper, dual exhausts, rear spoiler, and taillights, with the trunk and license plate area visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showcasing the snake graphic, wheels, and aerodynamic profile.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
